description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a streamlined body finished in glossy white. The front features sharp, angular headlights and a smooth, contoured hood, while the rear showcases a prominent engine cover and dual exhausts. Large, multi-spoke alloy wheels with low-profile tires emphasize its sporty character. The side windows are tinted black, seamlessly blending with the roofline, and the door handles are flush with the body for a modern look. Subtle air intakes and sculpted side panels enhance its aggressive stance. The overall design suggests a luxury sports car, likely intended for urban and high-speed environments.
description: A glossy white, low-profile coupe car with sharp headlights, large alloy wheels, and a streamlined, sporty design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharp headlights, contoured hood, and wide, low stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sleek profile, large alloy wheels, and flush door handles.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the engine cover, dual exhausts, and sculpted rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the aerodynamic lines and tinted windows.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
